changelog: FIX (DVR playback black-screen, attempt #2) — v1.44.32 added the MIME-type hint but the recording still opened paused with a black screen and pressing OK didn't unpause. Two new root causes found: (1) playWhenReady was being set on the next composition frame via a LaunchedEffect, which on slow devices left the player visibly paused for ~1 frame and triggered the auto-reconnect's stall watchdog; (2) the watchdog's 5 s buffer threshold was tuned for live streams — for a 700 MB recording with a 2 MB moov atom, the moov download itself can take 15+ s on slow WiFi, and the watchdog kept re-prepare()ing in a loop, restarting the moov download from scratch every time. Now: playWhenReady defaults to true synchronously in the remember{} block (Resume-prompt only flips it back when there's a genuine resume decision), AND the watchdog now uses a 30 s threshold for VOD/DVR (kept 5 s for live). Net effect: completed recordings start playing within a few seconds of opening and never get into the stuck-buffer-restart loop.
